# Lism CSS

> Lism CSS is a lightweight, layout-first CSS framework for rapidly building the structural skeleton of websites. No build step required — just import the CSS. It also provides dedicated React and Astro components via npm.

- GitHub: https://github.com/lism-css/lism-css
- npm: `lism-css` (core CSS + React components), `@lism-css/astro` (Astro components), `@lism-css/ui` (UI components)
- License: MIT

## Getting Started

- [Overview](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/overview/): An overview of Lism CSS and its key features
- [Installation](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/installation/): How to install and set up Lism CSS
- [Changelog](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/changelog/): Release history and changes

## Core Concepts

- [CSS Methodology](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/css-methodology/): The CSS design methodology behind Lism CSS
- [Design Tokens](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/tokens/): Token system for spacing, colors, and typography
- [Typography & Spacing](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/typography/): Typography scale and spacing rhythm
- [Base Styles](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/base-styles/): Default base styles applied by Lism CSS
- [Responsive](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/responsive/): Responsive design with breakpoint-aware props
- [Customize](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/customize/): How to customize tokens and theme settings

## CSS Classes

- [Set Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/set-class/): Set classes for applying grouped styles
- [Module Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/module-class/): Module classes for layout and component patterns
- [Utility Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/utility-class/): Single-purpose utility classes
- [Prop Class](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/prop-class/): Prop classes mapped to CSS properties

## Core Components

- [Lism](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Lism/): General-purpose base component that accepts Lism CSS props
- [HTML.xxx](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/HTML/): Apply Lism props to standard HTML elements

## State Modules

- [Container](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--container/): Content-width constrained container
- [Wrapper](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--wrapper/): Full-width wrapper with inner content constraints
- [Layer](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--layer/): Absolutely positioned overlay layer
- [LinkBox](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/is--linkbox/): Make an entire box clickable as a link

## Layout Modules

- [Box](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--box/): Basic box layout module
- [Flow](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--flow/): Vertical flow layout with consistent spacing
- [Frame](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--frame/): Aspect-ratio constrained frame
- [Flex](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--flex/): Flexbox layout module
- [Cluster](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--cluster/): Inline cluster layout for wrapping items
- [Stack](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--stack/): Vertical stack with gap spacing
- [SideMain](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--sidemain/): Sidebar + main content layout
- [Grid](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--grid/): CSS Grid layout module
- [Center](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--center/): Centering layout module
- [Columns](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--columns/): Equal-width column layout
- [FluidCols](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--fluidcols/): Fluid responsive columns with auto-fill
- [SwitchCols](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/l--switchcols/): Columns that switch layout at breakpoints

## Atomic Modules

- [Decorator](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--decorator/): Decorative element for visual accents
- [Divider](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--divider/): Horizontal or vertical divider line
- [Icon](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--icon/): Icon display module
- [Media](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/core-components/Media/): Image and media display component
- [Spacer](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/modules/a--spacer/): Spacing element for adding gaps

## UI Components

- [Accordion](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Accordion/): Expandable accordion component
- [Alert](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Alert/): Alert message component with variants
- [Avatar](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Avatar/): User avatar display component
- [Badge](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Badge/): Badge/label component
- [Button](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Button/): Button component with style variants
- [Callout](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Callout/): Callout/admonition component for highlighted notes
- [Chat](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Chat/): Chat bubble component
- [Details](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Details/): Details/summary disclosure component
- [Modal](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Modal/): Modal dialog component
- [NavMenu](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/NavMenu/): Navigation menu component
- [ShapeDivider](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/ShapeDivider/): SVG shape divider between sections
- [Tabs](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/Tabs/): Tab switching component
- [DummyText](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/DummyText/): Dummy placeholder text component for prototyping
- [DummyImage](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/DummyImage/): Dummy placeholder image component

## Optional

- [UI Examples](https://www.lism-css.com/en/ui/examples/Card/): Composable UI pattern examples (Card, Hero, Banner, Timeline, FAQ, etc.)
- [Props: Border](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/props/bd/): Border-related prop classes
- [Props: Hover](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/props/hov/): Hover effect prop classes
- [Props: Max Size](https://www.lism-css.com/en/docs/props/max-sz/): Size control prop classes
